Hi,
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We’re truly sorry to hear that your experience didn’t meet expectations. We hope you’ll consider giving us another try. We’d love the chance to make it right and offer you the experience Coffee Island is known for.
Please DM us your contact details on Instagram at @coffee.island.in or email us at hello@coffeeisland.in so we can connect directly.
Great to know you had a good experience. We’re working every day to elevate every cup and every bite — hope to welcome you back soon.
We appreciate your feedback and would love to know how we can make your next visit even better. Feel free to DM us on Instagram @coffee.island.in or email us at hello@coffeeisland.in.

reviews.comment:
This is not just coffee — it’s culture. Made using a strong decoction and served with hot milk in a steel tumbler and dabarah, filter coffee has a deep aroma and unmistakable taste.
It’s strong, frothy, and comforting all at once. For many, this coffee is tied to memories, mornings, and home. Flavor-wise, it easily competes with international café coffees. There staff was good 👍👍. Specially thank you anu she was amezing girl..

reviewReply.comment: We’re glad you enjoyed the flavours and the experience. The team will be happy to hear your kind words. Looking forward to welcoming you again soon.

reviews.comment:
Extremely poor service. We ordered cold coffee without ice. Our server returns with a glass that was precisely 1/3rd full... (no exaggeration) ...stating that since it was asked for without ice this is the quantity we would get. Upon sending it back, they then gave us a (half) full glass... pic attached.
The establishment had a dirty smell of pungent oil in the air which has lingered on my clothing even though we left an hour ago. Needless to say, I'm never going back there again and paying almost 400 bucks for a glass that was half full.

reviewReply.comment:
Hi,
We’ve made a careful note of your feedback and have shared it with our team for immediate review. Clarity around beverage portions and maintaining a comfortable, fresh café environment are both extremely important to us, and we’re looking into the concerns you’ve raised so we can address them appropriately.

If you’re open to it, we’d appreciate the chance to understand more about your visit and take this forward. Please feel free to DM us on Instagram @coffee.island.in or email us at hello@coffeeisland.in so we can connect directly.
